# FlowMCP — llms.txt Index

> Layered LLM context for FlowMCP. Pick the layer you need.

- Practical documentation: /docs-llms.txt
- Full website content (includes the Grading standard inline): /llms-full.txt
- Schema specification (v4.3.0): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FlowMCP/flowmcp-spec/main/generated/llms.txt
- Grading standard (gradingSpec v3.0.0): https://flowmcp.github.io/grading/overview/
- Schema best practices (bestPracticeSpec v0.1.0, advisory): https://flowmcp.github.io/best-practices.txt

Spec source: https://github.com/FlowMCP/flowmcp-spec
Docs: https://flowmcp.github.io/docs
GitHub: https://github.com/flowmcp
